_note: Provenance for every corpus document (ADR-007). 'seed' = hand-curated factual summary of a public authority, vetted, no verbatim proprietary text. 'discovery' docs (added later by LiteratureDiscovery) carry source_url + source_tier + retrieved_at + ingest_mode=discovery and are auditable / one-click removable.
